name: W
description: Source forward mass flow

name: F
description: Source molar or gas standard volumetric flow (before reaction)

name: Q
description: Source forward actual volumetric flow (after reaction)

name: P
description: Source pressure

name: T
description: Source equilibrium temperature

name: VF
description: Source unbounded molar vapor fraction (after reaction).\nVF < 0 is subcooled, VF = 0 is the bubble point, VF = 1 is the dew point, and VF > 1 is superheated

name: M[N2]
description: Source unnormalized molar feed composition (before reaction). To specify in fractions, specify all but one and specify Mt=1

name: M[O2]
description: Source unnormalized molar feed composition (before reaction). To specify in fractions, specify all but one and specify Mt=1

name: M[H2O]
description: Source unnormalized molar feed composition (before reaction). To specify in fractions, specify all but one and specify Mt=1

name: Mt
description: Source total moles for composition normalization

name: z[N2]
description: Source mole fractions (before reaction). Avoid specifying and instead specify M.

name: z[O2]
description: Source mole fractions (before reaction). Avoid specifying and instead specify M.

name: z[H2O]
description: Source mole fractions (before reaction). Avoid specifying and instead specify M.

name: zm[N2]
description: Source mass fractions (before reaction). Avoid specifying and instead specify M.

name: zm[O2]
description: Source mass fractions (before reaction). Avoid specifying and instead specify M.

name: zm[H2O]
description: Source mass fractions (before reaction). Avoid specifying and instead specify M.

name: MW
description: Source molecular weight (before reaction)

name: H
description: Source molar enthalpy (after reaction)

name: Feps
description: Source small sweep flow safeguard to issue a warning if the flow is smaller than FRramp

name: LF
description: Source molar liquid fraction
